div.p: Entry/Exit correlation → Log2 histogram → Userspace aggregation

ol.li: Entry kprobe → Write (tid, timestamp) to hash map
Exit kprobe → Read timestamp, compute latency, increment histogram bucket
Userspace poll → Read all 64 buckets (1 Hz)

Display → Format histogram with percentile annotations Key Insight: Histogram computed entirely in kernel. Only 512 bytes transferred per poll (vs. 16 bytes per event). At 100K syscalls/sec: 300× reduction in data transfer.
